questions.question: On which plans is Notion AI fully available (not just complimentary responses)?

options.explanation: The Free plan only offers a limited number of complimentary AI responses, not full access.
The Plus plan also only provides complimentary AI responses, not the full feature set.
Full Notion AI capabilities are available on Business and Enterprise plans.
Enterprise has full access, but Business also does; the correct answer includes both.

questions.question: What is the default keyboard shortcut to engage Notion AI?

options.explanation: By default, pressing Shift + Cmd (on macOS) or Ctrl (on Windows) together with J opens Notion AI.
This shortcut is not defined for Notion AI.
Cmd + Space opens Spotlight on macOS, not Notion AI.
No such shortcut exists for Notion AI.

questions.question: Which feature lets you create or edit images directly within Notion?

options.explanation: AI Meeting Notes transcribe and summarize meetings, not images.
AI Blocks generate text‑based content, not images.
The AI image generation feature lets you create new images or edit existing ones.
Translation changes language, not visual assets.

questions.question: How does the Notion Agent create or edit content on your behalf?

options.text: It only follows the exact words you type in the prompt.
options.explanation: The Agent does more than repeat the prompt; it draws on contextual information.

options.text: It uses context from your workspace and connected apps.
options.explanation: The Agent can access pages, databases, and linked apps to generate relevant content.

options.text: It relies exclusively on web search results.
options.explanation: While web search can be enabled, the Agent primarily uses internal context.

options.text: It copies pre‑written templates stored in Notion.
options.explanation: Templates are optional; the Agent’s power comes from understanding workspace data.

questions.question: Which tool lets you shape how the Notion Agent responds to your queries?

options.explanation: Keyboard shortcuts affect how you launch the Agent, not its behavior.
Instructions and skills let you customize the Agent’s personality and capabilities.
Web search expands data sources but doesn’t customize response style.

options.text: Adjusting the AI image generation settings
options.explanation: Those settings affect image creation, not the Agent’s overall behavior.

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of Enterprise Search in Notion AI?

options.explanation: Enterprise Search finds information; editing is a separate capability.

options.text: To locate answers using workspace pages, connected apps, and web sources.
options.explanation: Enterprise Search aggregates data from multiple sources to answer questions.

options.text: To translate pages into other languages.
options.explanation: Translation is a distinct feature, not part of Enterprise Search.
Image generation is unrelated to searching for information.

questions.question: Where do you toggle on Research Mode?

options.explanation: Research Mode is not toggled from the general Settings page.

options.text: In the Notion AI section of the sidebar
options.explanation: Research Mode is turned on via the Notion AI option in the sidebar.
There is no Tools menu for Research Mode.
Keyboard shortcuts control access, not the mode itself.

questions.question: Which of the following is NOT a capability of Notion AI for databases?

options.text: Creating databases with views and properties
options.explanation: AI can create full databases, including views and properties.
AI can help generate or modify formulas within a database.

options.text: Auto‑populating database pages with summaries and keywords
options.explanation: AI can fill in contextual information for database entries.

options.text: Performing web searches directly inside a database cell
options.explanation: While AI can browse the web for answers, it does not perform live web searches inside a specific cell.

questions.question: If a workspace owner wants to prevent Notion AI from browsing external websites, which setting should they disable?

options.explanation: AI Connectors control integrations, not general web search.

options.text: Toggle off "Enable web search for workspace" under AI Web Search
options.explanation: Turning off this toggle stops Notion AI from accessing the web.
Meeting Notes relate to transcription, not web browsing.
Removing the Agent would affect many functions, but the specific control is the web‑search toggle.

questions.question: How does Notion AI handle feedback given via the thumbs‑down button?

options.text: The feedback is used to directly train the AI model.
options.explanation: Feedback is not used for model training to protect user privacy.

options.text: The feedback is shared with the Notion team but not used to train the model.
options.explanation: Notion uses thumbs‑down feedback to improve the product, but it does not feed into the model.

options.text: The user's data is deleted automatically.
options.explanation: Thumbs‑down does not trigger data deletion.

options.text: Notion AI is disabled for that user.
options.explanation: Negative feedback does not disable the service for the user.
